title: Checkout and late checkout policy
text: Standard checkout is 12:00 PM. Late checkout until 2 PM is available for premium and loyalty guests at no extra charge. Extended late checkout (until 4 PM) can be requested at NGN 5,000.

title: Breakfast schedule and options
text: Complimentary breakfast buffet is served from 6:30 AM to 10:30 AM daily in the main restaurant. Room service breakfast is available from 6:00 AM at an additional charge. Continental, Nigerian, and international options available.

title: Cancellation and refund policy
text: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before check-in. Cancellations within 24 hours incur a one-night charge. No-shows are charged for the full stay. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days.

title: Hotel amenities and services
text: Amenities include: outdoor pool, fitness center (6 AM - 10 PM), free Wi-Fi, airport shuttle (NGN 15,000), laundry service (same-day), 24-hour concierge, business center, and complimentary parking.
